The '''''Reliance''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] for [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jimas Veltraa]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. During a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] advance that threatened the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] in [[3964 BBY]], Veltraa reformed what remained of the shattered [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]] into a makeshift force to defend Taris from a Mandalorian [[Taris Siege|siege]]. Although Veltraa and the ''Reliance'' held out to the very end, the ship was eventually destroyed with all hands lost.<ref name="jimas" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Reliance'' was first mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', an in-universe news report located at the end of [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released in [[2007]].<ref name="jimas" />
